name: The First National Bank Of Raymond
description_short: Community bank offering FDIC-insured checking, savings, agricultural lending, and mobile banking services with local branch locations.
description_long: First National Bank of Raymond is a traditional community bank operating in Raymond, Illinois, with a focus on personalized service and long-term customer relationships. The bank emphasizes its combined experience across hundreds of years of staff tenure and positions itself as a local alternative to larger national institutions. The bank offers standard retail banking products including checking and savings accounts, debit cards, online banking, mobile banking with deposit capture, and bill payment services. They also provide lending solutions with particular emphasis on agricultural loans, staffed by loan officers with farming backgrounds. Account holders can access 24/7 mobile and online banking, manage multiple accounts, create account alerts, and deposit checks remotely through their mobile app. FNB Raymond differentiates itself through specialized agricultural lending expertise and a community-focused service model. The bank is FDIC-insured and actively communicates security practices, including warnings about caller ID spoofing and fraud prevention. They offer both traditional branch banking and digital-first convenience through their mobile app available on iOS and Android platforms. As a smaller regional bank, FNB Raymond may have limitations in product breadth and digital innovation compared to national competitors. Their service area appears limited to Illinois, and the website does not advertise premium products like investment services, wealth management, or comprehensive business banking suites. Customers requiring complex financial services or multi-state account access may need to supplement with larger institutions.
services: Debit card services with remote on/off toggle
Online banking with bill payment functionality
Mobile deposit capture with established limits
Agricultural lending and specialized farm loans
Account balance and transaction history viewing
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. government guarantee
24/7 mobile and online banking with remote deposit capture functionality
Specialized agricultural lending with experienced loan officers
Strong fraud prevention awareness and anti-scam communication
eStatement option to reduce paper clutter
Mobile app compatible with iOS and Android devices
Debit card on/off toggle feature for security control
cons: Limited geographic service area (appears Illinois-based only)
No mention of investment products, wealth management, or business banking suites
Website does not list current interest rates, fees, or account minimums
Mobile app functionality limited by device compatibility and carrier data/text fees
No competitive advantage in terms of digital innovation compared to national banks
best_for: Agricultural business owners and farmers seeking specialized lending expertise
Raymond, Illinois residents and surrounding communities seeking local banking relationships
Customers prioritizing personalized service and community commitment over digital innovation
Users who want secure 24/7 access to accounts via mobile and online platforms
diagnosis: FNB Raymond is best for agricultural businesses and local community members in Illinois seeking relationship-based banking with strong farm lending expertise and 24/7 digital access. The primary caveat is limited geographic service and lack of specialized financial products like investments or wealth management, making it unsuitable for customers requiring comprehensive financial services or those outside their service area.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: The First National Bank of Raymond
